title: Primary Sclerosing Cholangitis (PSC)
subtitle: Understanding PSC — a chronic condition affecting the bile ducts
description: Clear, evidence-based information about primary sclerosing cholangitis (PSC) — what it is, the IBD connection, monitoring, treatment options, and when to seek help. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
